lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds lovely, what tune is that?

lines.speaker: Reshi
lines.text: Oh, this? It's just the beginning of something, still a lot more to come.

lines.speaker: Reshi
lines.text: I s'pose the working title is...'The Doors of Dinh'.

lines.speaker: Reshi
lines.text: We come from Varlamore... We're students of the College of Bards.

lines.speaker: Reshi
lines.text: Or did you want to know where I'm from specifically? My home was destroyed long ago by an evil saltwater deity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's certainly a dark and tortured backstory. Say, have you slain any dragons? Wooed a beautiful princess? Sought revenge on the fiend who killed your family?

lines.speaker: Reshi
lines.text: ...Dragons? Slain. Princesses? Wooed... but revenge, that's still brewing.
